T0021.title: Shield Bypass
T0021.definition: Refers to bypassing a platform's risk control systems. This term is commonly used by fraud technicians, scalpers, and money laundering groups as a preliminary step to evade security measures before attacking platform services or stealing data.
T0021.description: Refers to bypassing a platform's risk control systems. This term is commonly used by fraud technicians, scalpers, and money laundering groups as a preliminary step to evade security measures before attacking platform services or stealing data.
T0021.usageExample: 这个活动新加了设备指纹校验，不先破盾的话，我们写的脚本根本登录不上去。
